name: Kelso Park
description: Come play pickleball at Kelso Park in Kelso, MO! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility is wheelchair accessible.

name: Sikeston Complex
description: Sikeston Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sikeston, MO. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and lights.

name: St. Ambrose Catholic School
description: Come play pickleball at St. Ambrose Catholic School in Chaffee, MO! There is 1 indoor wood court. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A membership is required to play.
